query: Taylor Swift The Life of a Showgirl most-streamed album 2025 major platforms

{"query":"Taylor Swift The Life of a Showgirl most-streamed album 2025 major platforms","model":"mako","response_time_ms":2277,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://newsroom.spotify.com/2025-10-03/taylor-swift-life-showgirl-spotify-record/","title":"Taylor Swift’s ‘The Life of a Showgirl’ Breaks Spotify’s 2025 Single-Day Streaming Record — Spotify","content":"Fans were able to journey into a vibrant reimagining of the album’s universe complete with glittering photo moments, hidden Easter eggs, and exclusive giveaways.
This new streaming record adds to a growing list of Spotify milestones for Taylor.
Just days before its release, The Life of a Showgirl became the most pre-saved album in Spotify history, surpassing 6 million pre-saves and breaking the record previously held by THE TORTURED POETS DEPARTMENT."},{"url":"https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/music/music-industry-news/taylor-swift-life-of-a-showgirl-streaming-records-1236392589/","title":"Taylor Swift's 'The Life of a Showgirl' Beats Spotify 2025 Record","content":"Swift released her much-anticipated 12th album The Life of a Showgirl on Friday, and not even 12 hours since its midnight drop, it’s already got the most single-day streams on Spotify in 2025 so far, the platform confirmed Friday morning.
Apple Music, meanwhile, similarly confirmed that the album now holds the most single-day streams for a record this year.
Meanwhile, “The Fate of Ophelia,” the album’s first song and its lead single, is now the most-streamed song in a single day on Spotify and Apple Music, the companies confirmed.
Showgirl comes months after she announced she’d at last bought her masters for her first six albums, ending a dramatic saga that launched Swift’s famed “Taylor’s Version” releases of her older music.
It also comes less than two months after Swift had revealed that she and now-fiancé Travis Kelce got engaged."},{"url":"https://musically.com/2025/10/06/music-services-scramble-to-tout-taylor-swift-streaming-records/","title":"Music services scramble to tout Taylor Swift streaming records - Music Ally","content":"“The Life of a Showgirl became Spotify’s most-streamed album in a single day in 2025 so far, hitting this 2025 milestone in under 11 hours,” announced Spotify.
“The Life of a Showgirl has become the most-streamed album of all time in its first 24 hours on Amazon Music globally, breaking her own previous record set by The Tortured Poets Department,” said Amazon Music.
Meanwhile, cinematic release ‘The Official Release Party of a Showgirl’ bagged$46m of global box-office sales in its three-day run this weekend.
Firebird Music Holdings has a new $750m fund for acquiring…"},{"url":"https://deadline.com/2025/10/taylor-swift-life-of-a-showgirl-breaks-multiple-spotify-records-1236570076/","title":"Taylor Swift's 'Life of a Showgirl' Breaks Multiple Spotify Records","content":"On Friday, Spotify announced that Swift’s The Life of a Showgirl broke a 2025 record, while the album’s lead single ‘The Fate of Ophelia’ has broken an all-time record for the music streaming platform.
On October 3rd, Taylor Swift's The Life of a Showgirl became Spotify's most-streamed album in a single day in 2025 so far. pic.twitter.com/mBqniYY4xf"},{"url":"https://www.sortiraparis.com/en/news/in-paris/articles/334330-taylor-swift-s-album-the-life-of-a-showgirl-becomes-the-most-streamed-in-a-day","title":"Taylor Swift: her album "The Life of a Showgirl" becomes the most streamed in one day - Sortiraparis.com","content":"Taylor Swift has just smashed a new record on Spotify with her 12th album The Life of a Showgirl, which became the most streamed album in a single day in 2025, less than 11 hours after its release on October 3.
The American singer's 12th studio album became the most listened-to album in a single day on several streaming platforms, including Spotify, Apple Music and Amazon Music.
This phenomenal success follows an already exceptional year for the artist, who has just become engaged to American soccer player Travis Kelce.
The 12-track opus was created in Sweden with producers Max Martin and Shellback, two stalwarts of the pop music industry.
Last year, The Tortured Poets Department opened with 2.61 million units sold, including 1.9 million in physical format."}]}

On October 3, ***The Life of a Showgirl*** became Spotify’s most-streamed album in a single day this year, reaching the milestone in less than 11 hours. As streams soared, *The Life of a Showgirl* proved it was more than a release: It was a cultural moment. In the days leading up to the drop, Spotify partnered with Taylor to bring the world of *Showgirl* to life through a three-day immersive fan experience in New York City. Just days before its release, *The Life of a Showgirl* became the most pre-saved album in Spotify history, surpassing **6 million pre-saves** and breaking the record previously held by ***THE TORTURED POETS DEPARTMENT***. With *The Life of a Showgirl*, Taylor continues to set the standard not just in streaming, but in how artists connect with fans around the world. ### Spotify Celebrates Taylor Swift’s Most Anticipated Album Yet With an Immersive Fan Experience in NYC.","score":0.9014448,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.instagram.com/p/DPWkLhwjvx3?hl=en","title":"On October 3rd, Taylor Swift's The Life of a Showgirl ...","content":"On October 3rd, Taylor Swift's The Life of a Showgirl became Spotify's most-streamed album in a single day in 2025 so far.","score":0.898277,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.businessinsider.com/taylor-swift-life-of-a-showgirl-streaming-box-office-records-2025-10","title":"Taylor Swift Is Breaking Her Own Records With 'the Life of a Showgirl' - Business Insider","content":"# Taylor Swift is breaking her own records with 'The Life of a Showgirl'.
